images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, featuring flawless skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, and a fit, curvy body. She is dressed in trendy, sexy denim dungarees worn over a delicate lace camisole, the straps sliding off her shoulders to accentuate her slim waist and ample chest, fabric textures blending rough denim with sheer silk. The background is a dreamy bokeh of snow-laden trees.
